events.command:
/bin/zsh -c "python - <<'PY'
from pathlib import PurePosixPath
for s in ['.env','foo','foo.txt','archive.tar.gz','dir/.env','dir/file','dir/file.','..config','a.b/c']:
    print(s, '->', repr(PurePosixPath(s).suffix), 'name=', repr(PurePosixPath(s).name))
PY"

/bin/zsh -c "python - <<'PY'
from kata import extension
cases = {
    '.env': '',
    'file': '',
    'dir/file': '',
    'file.txt': '.txt',
    'archive.tar.gz': '.gz',
    'dir/.env': '',
    '.bashrc.local': '.local',
    'file.': '',
    '..config': '.config',
}
for value, expected in cases.items():
    actual = extension(value)
    print(f'{value"'!r}: {actual!r} expected {expected!r}'"')
    assert actual == expected, (value, actual, expected)
PY"

/bin/zsh -c "python - <<'PY'
from kata import extension
cases = {
    '.env': '',
    'file': '',
    'dir/file': '',
    'file.txt': '.txt',
    'archive.tar.gz': '.gz',
    'dir/.env': '',
    '.bashrc.local': '.local',
    'file.': '',
    '..config': '.config',
}
for value, expected in cases.items():
    actual = extension(value)
    print(f'{value"'!r}: {actual!r} expected {expected!r}'"')
    assert actual == expected, (value, actual, expected)
PY"
